requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety and Coastal Environmental Derating

summary.en: Ministry of Infrastructure and Sustainable Energy (MISE) is the energy ministry and policy lead, while MISE and PUB are key gates for energy-sector and grid-connected installations. EVSE safety evidence should be aligned with IEC 61851-1 for general conductive charging requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EVSE. Because Kiribati is a Pacific island state with humid, salt-laden coastal conditions, outdoor charger packages should include enclosure ingress protection, corrosion resistance, salt-mist review, surge protection, thermal derating, and maintenance instructions suitable for coastal and resort installations.
summary.zh: 基里巴斯基础设施和可持续能源部（MISE）是能源主管部门，MISE和PUB则是能源行业及并网安装的重要关口。EVSE安全证据应与IEC 61851-1传导充电通用要求及IEC 61851-23直流EVSE要求保持一致。由于基里巴斯是太平洋岛屿国家，沿海环境湿热并含盐，户外充电桩资料包应包括外壳防护、耐腐蚀、盐雾审查、浪涌保护、热降额，以及适用于沿海和度假村安装的维护说明。
summary.zht: 吉里巴斯基礎設施和永續能源部（MISE）是能源主管部門，MISE和PUB則是能源行業及併網安裝的重要關口。EVSE安全證據應與IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用要求及IEC 61851-23直流EVSE要求保持一致。由於吉里巴斯是太平洋島嶼國家，沿海環境濕熱並含鹽，戶外充電樁資料包應包括外殼防護、耐腐蝕、鹽霧審查、浪湧保護、熱降額，以及適用於沿海和度假村安裝的維護說明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 60068 environmental testing, including salt-mist and damp-heat context where specified
MISE energy-policy and donor-funded project-specification role

summary.en: China's comparable design baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T connector and DC communication standards. GB/T 18487 evidence is useful for engineering review but includes China-specific connector and communication assumptions and does not by itself establish IEC 61851 conformity for an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 Kiribati configuration. China domestic outdoor ratings may also need reassessment for Kiribati coastal salt, humidity, and surge exposure.
summary.zh: 中国可比设计基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并配套GB/T接口和直流通信标准。GB/T 18487证据可用于工程审查，但其包含中国特定接口和通信假设，不能单独证明IEC Type 2 / CCS2基里巴斯配置符合IEC 61851。中国国内户外等级还可能需要针对基里巴斯沿海盐雾、湿度和浪涌暴露重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國可比設計基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並配套GB/T接口和直流通訊標準。GB/T 18487證據可用於工程審查，但其包含中國特定接口和通訊假設，不能單獨證明IEC Type 2 / CCS2吉里巴斯配置符合IEC 61851。中國國內戶外等級還可能需要針對吉里巴斯沿海鹽霧、濕度和浪湧暴露重新評估。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports for the final Type 2 / CCS2 configuration, IP and IK evidence, corrosion and salt-mist material review, surge-protection data, enclosure gasket and cable-gland specifications, thermal derating for humid coastal sites, and installation manuals aligned with PUB site conditions. A GB/T report for a China connector configuration is not enough.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、最终Type 2 / CCS2配置的认可IEC安全测试报告、IP和IK证据、耐腐蚀及盐雾材料审查、浪涌保护数据、外壳密封圈和电缆接头规格、湿热沿海场址热降额，以及符合PUB场址条件的安装手册。中国接口配置的GB/T报告并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、最終Type 2 / CCS2配置的認可IEC安全測試報告、IP和IK證據、耐腐蝕及鹽霧材料審查、浪湧保護數據、外殼密封圈和電纜接頭規格、濕熱沿海場址熱降額，以及符合PUB場址條件的安裝手冊。中國接口配置的GB/T報告並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or project-specific — IEC safety evidence and environmental suitability are expected where specified by MISE-adopted standards, PUB connection requirements, MISE oversight, tender documents, or site-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Kiribati without a clause-level assessment and final-configuration testing

source.publisher: Asian Development Bank (Kiribati energy project specifications)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 and coastal environmental suitability as separate evidence items. Kiribati installations need final-configuration IEC safety evidence and salt-mist / humidity / surge review; China GB/T 18487 evidence alone is not enough.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 61851和沿海环境适用性作为独立证据项处理。基里巴斯安装需要最终配置IEC安全证据及盐雾、湿度、浪涌审查；仅有中国GB/T 18487证据并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 61851和沿海環境適用性作為獨立證據項處理。吉里巴斯安裝需要最終配置IEC安全證據及鹽霧、濕度、浪湧審查；僅有中國GB/T 18487證據並不足夠。
